name: deck-forge-harness
description: Agentic slide-deck workflow plugin that combines Playwright-style capture, frontend slide design, and task-specific harness automation for PPTX delivery.

interface.shortDescription: Build decks from web capture, frontend design, and verified PPTX export.
interface.longDescription: DeckForge Harness gives Codex a repeatable workflow for presentation projects: capture web evidence with Playwright or browser tools, design slides as frontend canvases, create task-specific harnesses for local tools, then export and verify PowerPoint deliverables.
defaultPrompt: Use DeckForge to build a PPT from web research.
Capture this site and design slides from it.
Create a harness for this deck workflow.
